{{Quote|The ship has not been built that Rak'k cannot pilot.|Rak'k upon obtaining Ship from Alema Rar|<ref name="Legacy of the Force: Inferno">''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]''</ref>}}
'''Rak'k''' was a [[Barabel/Legends|Barabel]] living on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] around [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. A member of the ground crew at Korriban's spaceport, he agreed to tell [[Alema Rar]] the location of the [[One Sith]], over the objections of his companions, [[Yas'tua]] and a [[Unnamed Korriban ground crewman|Human]], in return for [[Ship (Sith Meditation Sphere)|Alema's ship]] in the event she didn't return. Alema's Force powers, however, caused him and his companions to forget about the bargain shortly after she left.
